# Cash Stage

> Cash Stage is a competitive music platform where artists battle, drop solos, and collab for real money with anonymous voting and real payouts.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Cash Stage — battles, solo drops, collabs, wallet, anti-cheat.

- [Pricing](/pricing): Subscription tiers and what they unlock.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy and data handling.
- [Sign In](/auth): Sign up or sign in to enter the stage.
